movie.actors: John G. Brennan, Kamal Ahmed, Alan Arkin, William Hickey
movie.plot: When two unemployed telephone pranksters decide to use their vocal "talents" to impersonate a Chicago mob boss and curry favor with organized crime in New York, the trouble begins. It isn't...
movie.title: The Jerky Boys
movie.writer: James Melkonian, Rich Wilkes, John G. Brennan, Kamal Ahmed
